title: HitColor+
description: Allows modifying the damage tint color for entities and their armor.
body:
# Notice

**I've started doing Minecraft comissions in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Ce6Vty6khA)!**

# HitColor+

A simple mod that lets you:

- Change the entity hit color.
- Apply the hit color to worn armor models.

Configure the mod directly in-game using [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)!
